name: cursor-linkup-mcp
description: Root scripts only. Stitch UI lives under temp_repo/stitch/apps/desktop (Tauri + Vite).

scripts.dev:browser: npm run sync:stitch && npm --prefix temp_repo/stitch/apps/desktop run dev:browser
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run sync:stitch && npm --prefix temp_repo/stitch/apps/desktop run dev
scripts.build:stitch-app: npm run sync:stitch && npm --prefix temp_repo/stitch/apps/desktop run tauri -- build
scripts.build:stitch-web: npm run sync:stitch && npm --prefix temp_repo/stitch/apps/desktop run build
